chapter: Chapter 5: Tales by Dots and Lines

questions.question: What does the mean of a dataset represent?
questions.explanation: Mean is the average obtained by dividing the sum of observations by the number of observations.

questions.question: Which measure represents the middle value of an ordered dataset?
questions.explanation: Median is the middle value when data is arranged in order.

questions.question: What is the mean of the numbers 2, 4, 6, 8?
Which tool is commonly used to organize data in rows and columns?
questions.explanation: Spreadsheets organize data in rows and columns for calculations.

questions.question: Which graph is commonly used to show changes over time?
questions.explanation: Line graphs display trends and changes over time.

questions.question: What does each dot represent in a dot plot?
questions.explanation: Each dot represents one observation in the dataset.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes a dataset?
questions.explanation: A dataset is a collection of related data values.

questions.question: What is the median of 3, 5, 7, 9, 11?
questions.explanation: 7 is the middle value after arranging numbers.

questions.question: Which part of a graph shows the values being measured?
questions.explanation: Axes display the measured values and categories.

questions.question: What is the mean of 5, 10, 15?
What does a line graph mainly help us identify?
questions.explanation: Line graphs show how data changes across time.

questions.question: Which measure is calculated using all observations?
questions.explanation: Mean uses every value in the dataset.

questions.question: What is the median of 4, 6, 8, 10, 12?
questions.explanation: 8 is the middle value of the ordered dataset.

questions.question: Which tool allows automatic calculation of averages?
questions.explanation: Spreadsheets allow formulas such as average.

questions.question: What is the mean of 1, 3, 5, 7?
Which graph connects points with line segments?
questions.explanation: Line graphs connect plotted points.

questions.question: Which of the following helps visualize patterns in data?
questions.explanation: Graphs help visualize trends and patterns.

questions.question: What does a spreadsheet cell represent?
questions.explanation: Cells are formed by intersection of rows and columns.

questions.question: What is the median of 2, 4, 6, 8?
Which graph type is best for showing temperature changes daily?
questions.explanation: Line graphs show trends across time periods.

questions.question: What is the mean of 10, 20, 30?
Which concept represents the balancing point of data?
questions.explanation: Mean acts as the balancing point of data.

questions.question: Which visual tool represents data points using dots?
questions.explanation: Dot plots display individual data points as dots.

questions.question: What does the title of a graph describe?
questions.explanation: Graph title explains what the graph represents.

questions.question: Which statement about mean is correct?

options.C: It uses all values in dataset

questions.explanation: Mean considers every value in the dataset.
